prompt: Write a 12-tweet launch thread for openpatent.ai's customer-acquisition campaign. Each tweet ≤260 chars. Tweet 1 must hook with the AI-idea-theft pain in one concrete sentence (e.g. 'A fine-tune of GPT published a 6.2B copy of my agent architecture 4 days after my arXiv preprint'). Tweet 2 introduces the 6-layer cryptographic disclosure stack (SHA-3/512, HMAC, Ed25519, Bitcoin OTS, C2PA, hash-chained audit). Tweet 3 names the $10 starter tier. Tweet 4 lists the 5-tier ladder ($29, $149, $999, $2499, $4999/mo). Tweet 5 names 3 of the 10+ jurisdictions (US 35 USC 102, EU eIDAS, WIPO 2022). Tweet 6 names the auto-disclose cron daemon (6-hour sweep). Tweet 7 cites the 22/33 BFT sovereign-temple v3.0. Tweet 8 names the .ai portfolio (openpatent.ai, ipcastle.ai, legalof.ai, harvi.ai, gaming.openpatent.ai, sovereign.openpatent.ai). Tweet 9 quotes a synthetic pro-IP figure (open-source maintainer) on sovereignty. Tweet 10 cites the MCP 33-tool surface. Tweet 11 names the waitlist CTA (openpatent.ai/waitlist). Tweet 12 closes with the canonical signature line. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {thread:[12 strings], signature:string}.
